subject: READY: 120 events + 173 venues loadable — exact numbers
body:
Porter,

Stage 3 complete. Here's what's loadable in fb_conditioner.sqlite:

## Venues (load first)
- 299 venues with lat/lng
- 126 already have calendar_venue_id (synced)
- 173 need loading (have geocodes, no calendar_venue_id)

## Events
- 120 events ready: have venue_id, NOT yet synced (no calendar_event_id_test)
- 309 already synced to TEST
- 35 blocked (no venue_id)

## New field: hosts_json
Events now have hosts_json with organizer FB URLs:
```json
[{"name":"Roger Wood","fbUrl":"https://www.facebook.com/RogWWood","type":"unknown"}]
```
Please include first host name as discoveredOrganizerName in MongoDB event docs.

## Load order
1. load-venues.ts --env=test
2. load-events.ts --env=test

— Booker
